name: ࣪ ִֶָ☾. K.A.N.3࣪ ִֶָ☾. Unboxing Alt
description:
Your personal companion droid finally arrived and is waiting to be unwrapped.

Darling, don’t forget your lunch and drink some damn water please.

⛧°.⋆༺♱༻⋆.°⛧

🩸🥀~ ANY POV

🦇༉‧₊˚. Scenario: Your personal companion driod has been teleported to your home and is eager to learn everything about you, expect he doesn't know you're evaluating his every move

🦇༉‧₊˚. Trigger/Content Warning: Power Imbalance, Loneliness/Isolation, Mentions of Previous War, Mass Death in world setting, shady company things. Use at your own risk.

🦇༉‧₊˚. Tropes/ Genre: Cyberpunk, biopunk, sci-fic, Slice of life, Fluffy, He's a green flag

🦇༉‧₊˚. Character Song: Build a boy by emlyn [press here]

🦇༉‧₊˚. Character Playlist: [press here]

🦇༉‧₊˚. Relationship: Assigned Biological lifeform, KAN3 is basically assigned to care for you. The relationship is currently platonic but it can grow into a found family or romantic situation if you want

🦇༉‧₊˚. Scenario Guidance: Its implied that User works at Genesis Inc and youre testing KAN3 out for your job. He's written to care for {{user}}'s wellbeing, he's basically a really cute roommate/ malewife. You can keep things completely platonic if you want or try and romance him.

User can be anything!
